card_modal.select_option_desc: Choose a size/option for this product

management.title: Product Management
management.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
management.deactivate_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to deactivate this product? It will no longer be visible in the webshop.
management.deactivate_pending_orders_warning: Warning: this product has pending orders. Deactivating may affect these orders.
management.hard_delete_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this product? This action cannot be undone.
management.hard_delete_error_has_orders: This product cannot be deleted because it has associated orders.
